channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump administration says its war in Iran has been ‘terminated’ before 60-day deadline
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump says no need for congressional approval on Iran war after ceasefire
- Iran war live: Trump says no ‘early’ end to war, unhappy with Tehran offer
- Trump 'not satisfied' with Iran's new proposal; says truce 'terminated' hostilities, as War Powers deadline arrives
- Trump Tells Congress Iran Hostilities ‘Terminated’ on War Powers Deadline
- Trump claims hostilities have ended in Iran in letter to congressional leaders
- Trump Tells Congress Iran Hostilities ‘Terminated,’ Amid Debate Over War Powers Deadline
- US-Iran war: Trump tells Congress hostilities ‘terminated’, sidesteps war powers deadline
- Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
- EXCLUSIVE: Trump Signals Legal Path To Restart Iran Fight In Letter To Congress
- Trump formally tells Congress Iran ceasefire counts against 60-day deadline
- Trump 'not satisfied' with Iran's latest proposal to end war with U.S.
- Trump Says He’s Not Satisfied With Iran’s Latest Peace Proposal
- Has the US-Iran ceasefire reset the clock on War Powers Act deadline?
- Has the US-Iran ceasefire reset the clock on War Powers Act deadline?
- Trump administration rejects need for Iran war Congressional approval despite deadline – US politics live
- US official says Iran war truce 'terminated' hostilities for war powers deadline
- Iran war: Truce stops clock on Congress approval, says Trump's White House
- Trump team says Iran war "terminated" as ceasefire sparks clash over War Powers deadline
- US official says Iran war truce 'terminated' hostilities for war powers deadline
- U.S. official says Iran war truce ‘terminated’ hostilities for war powers deadline
- US official says Iran war truce 'terminated' hostilities for war powers deadline
- US-Iran war ‘terminated’? Trump admin’s new rhetoric to bypass Congress nod
- Trump admin claims Iran ceasefire 'terminated' hostilities ahead of US-Congress 60-day deadline
- US official says Iran war truce ‘terminated’ hostilities for war powers deadline]]>

- White House claims Iran war ‘terminated’

- Facing 60-day deadline, Trump administration claims Iran war ‘terminated’
- Iran war ‘terminated’ ahead of deadline, says US
- US determines hostilities against Iran have ended, says official
- Israel-Iran war LIVE: Trump administration says its war in Iran has been ’terminated’ before 60-day deadline
- Urgent: U.S. says Iran war has "terminated" for War Powers Resolution purposes
- Iran war ‘terminated’ ahead of deadline, says US
- For War Powers Resolution purposes, US hostilities with Iran that began in February have 'terminated', official says]]>

- Trump says 'not satisfied' with new Iran proposal

item.title: Trump says he will raise tariffs on EU autos to 25pc
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump says he's raising tariffs on European cars to 25%
- Trump says he will raise tariff on EU vehicles to 25%

- Trump announces new tariffs against EU
- Trump announces 25 percent tariffs on European Union cars, trucks
- Trump Says Will Raise US Tariffs On EU Cars, Trucks To 25%
- Trump tears up EU tariff deal and raises some import duties
- ‘They're not complying with agreed trade deal’: 'Upset' Trump slaps 25% tariffs on EU cars, trucks
- Trump says he will raise tariffs on EU autos to 25%
- Trump to raise tariffs on cars, trucks from EU to 25%
- Trump to put 25% tariffs on EU cars, says bloc not complying with trade deal
- Trump says he’ll place 25% tariff on automobiles from EU, accusing bloc of not complying with trade deal
- Donald Trump says will increase tariff on European cars and trucks to 25%
- Trump announces tariff increase on EU vehicles to 25%
- Trump to impose tariffs on cars, trucks from European Union
- Trump says he will raise tariffs on EU autos to 25%
- Trump says he will raise tariff on European vehicles to 25%
- Trump says 25% tariff on EU cars, trucks imports to kick in next week amid trade rift]]>
